name: GEOPERF Phase 2 — Apollo Sourcing & Prospect DB

parameters.query: SELECT c.id AS company_id, c.nom, c.domain, c.country, rc.visibility_score, r.id AS report_id, r.category_id FROM public.report_companies rc JOIN public.companies c ON c.id = rc.company_id JOIN public.reports r ON r.id = rc.report_id WHERE r.id = (($1::jsonb)->>'report_id')::uuid AND c.domain IS NOT NULL ORDER BY rc.rank;

INSERT INTO public.prospects (company_id, category_id, report_id, apollo_person_id, first_name, last_name, full_name, email, email_verified, phone, linkedin_url, title, seniority, job_function, lead_score, metadata) VALUES ((($1::jsonb)->>'company_id')::uuid, (($1::jsonb)->>'category_id')::uuid, (($1::jsonb)->>'report_id')::uuid, ($1::jsonb)->>'apollo_person_id', ($1::jsonb)->>'first_name', ($1::jsonb)->>'last_name', ($1::jsonb)->>'full_name', ($1::jsonb)->>'email', (($1::jsonb)->>'email_verified')::boolean, ($1::jsonb)->>'phone', ($1::jsonb)->>'linkedin_url', ($1::jsonb)->>'title', ($1::jsonb)->>'seniority', ($1::jsonb)->>'job_function', (($1::jsonb)->>'lead_score')::int, ($1::jsonb)->'metadata') ON CONFLICT (apollo_person_id) DO UPDATE SET lead_score = EXCLUDED.lead_score, email = EXCLUDED.email, email_verified = EXCLUDED.email_verified, phone = EXCLUDED.phone, title = EXCLUDED.title, metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id, tracking_token, lead_score, status;
INSERT INTO public.prospect_events (prospect_id, event_type, channel, direction, metadata) VALUES ((($1::jsonb)->>'prospect_id')::uuid, 'prospect_created', 'system', 'system', $1::jsonb);

WITH agg AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE email_verified) AS verified, ROUND(AVG(lead_score)::numeric, 1) AS avg_score, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE lead_score >= (($1::jsonb)->>'min_lead_score')::int) AS sequence_a_eligible FROM public.prospects WHERE report_id = (($1::jsonb)->>'report_id')::uuid), by_co AS (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('company', c.nom, 'count', sub.cnt) ORDER BY sub.cnt DESC) AS by_company FROM (SELECT company_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM public.prospects WHERE report_id = (($1::jsonb)->>'report_id')::uuid GROUP BY company_id) sub JOIN public.companies c ON c.id = sub.company_id) SELECT json_build_object('total', agg.total, 'verified', agg.verified, 'avg_score', agg.avg_score, 'sequence_a_eligible', agg.sequence_a_eligible, 'by_company', COALESCE(by_co.by_company, '[]'::json)) AS summary FROM agg, by_co;
